name: snipara
description: Project-scoped memory and context for AI agents - durable decisions, source-backed retrieval, code graph context, and team collaboration

snipara.maxTokens.description: Maximum context budget for retrieval queries

snipara.searchMode.description: Search mode for source-backed retrieval queries

snipara.enableAutoRestore.description: Automatically restore previous session context on startup

snipara.enableAutoSave.description: Automatically save session context on shutdown and periodically (every 5 minutes)

snipara.runtimeEnabled.description: Enable RLM Runtime integration (execute code, view logs, launch visualizer)

viewsWelcome.contents:
Run a query to see results.

[Try Demo Query](command:snipara.demoQuery)

[Sign in (free)](command:snipara.configure)

Run a query to see results.

[Ask Question](command:snipara.askQuestion)

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Snipara
walkthroughs.description: Project memory and context for agents in 4 steps

steps.title: See it in action
steps.description:
Run a demo query — no sign-in needed.

[Try Demo Query](command:snipara.demoQuery)

steps.title: Sign in for free
steps.description:
30-day free Pro account, no credit card.

[Sign in with GitHub](command:snipara.configure)

steps.title: Index project context
steps.description:
Sync your markdown files so agents can retrieve source-backed context.

[Sync Documents](command:snipara.syncDocuments)

steps.title: Ask your project
steps.description:
Retrieve your own project context.

[Ask Question](command:snipara.askQuestion)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_contextQuery
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search and retrieve relevant project context from Snipara
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search and retrieve relevant project context from Snipara. Use this to find source-backed information about code, APIs, architecture, decisions, or project documentation.

query.description: The question or topic to search for

languageModelTools.name: snipara_remember
languageModelTools.userDescription: Store a fact, decision, or learning for later recall
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Store a fact, decision, learning, or preference for later recall. Memories persist across sessions.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_recall
languageModelTools.userDescription: Recall relevant memories by semantic search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Semantically recall relevant memories based on a query. Uses embeddings to find similar memories.

query.description: Search query to find relevant memories

languageModelTools.name: snipara_sharedContext
languageModelTools.userDescription: Load team coding standards and best practices
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve team coding standards, best practices, and guidelines from shared context collections.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_search
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search documentation using regex patterns
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search documentation using regex patterns. Use when the user needs to find specific code patterns, function names, or text in documentation.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_askQuick
languageModelTools.userDescription: Quick project context lookup
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Quick project context lookup. Use for simple questions when full context retrieval is unnecessary.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_multiQuery
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run multiple project context queries in parallel
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute multiple project context queries in parallel with a shared context budget. Use when the user asks about multiple topics at once.

queries.description: List of queries to execute in parallel

maxTokens.description: Total context budget across all queries (default: 8000)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_plan
languageModelTools.userDescription: Generate step-by-step plan for complex documentation queries
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate a step-by-step execution plan for complex documentation queries. Use when the question requires multiple search passes or spans many topics.

query.description: The complex question to plan for

languageModelTools.name: snipara_decompose
languageModelTools.userDescription: Break complex queries into optimized sub-queries
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Break a complex query into smaller sub-queries with dependencies. Use when a question is too broad for a single search.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_multiProjectQuery
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search documentation across all team projects
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search documentation across all team projects simultaneously. Use when the user wants to find implementations across the entire organization.

query.description: The question to search across all projects

maxTokens.description: Total context budget across all projects (default: 16000)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_memories
languageModelTools.userDescription: Browse stored memories with filters
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Browse stored memories with optional type and search filters. Use to list all remembered facts, decisions, or learnings.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_forget
languageModelTools.userDescription: Delete stored memories
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete stored memories by ID, type, or category. Use when the user wants to remove outdated or incorrect memories.

type.description: Delete all memories of this type

category.description: Delete all memories in this category

languageModelTools.name: snipara_stats
languageModelTools.userDescription: View documentation index statistics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get documentation statistics including file count, section count, and total characters indexed.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_uploadDocument
languageModelTools.userDescription: Upload a document to the Snipara index
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Upload or update a document in the Snipara index. Use when the user wants to add new documentation for querying.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_loadDocument
languageModelTools.userDescription: Load raw document content by file path (Pro+)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Load raw document content by file path. Returns the full unprocessed content of a single document for direct exploration. Requires Pro plan or higher.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_loadProject
languageModelTools.userDescription: Load full project context (Team+)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Load a structured map of all project documents with content and metadata. Use for full-project exploration. Requires Team plan or higher.

maxTokens.description: Total context budget for returned content (default: 16000)

pathsFilter.description: Only include files matching these path prefixes (e.g. ['docs/', 'src/'])

includeContent.description: Include file content (false = metadata only, default: true)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_orchestrate
languageModelTools.userDescription: Multi-round context exploration (Team+)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Multi-round context exploration in a single call. Performs: (1) section scan for project structure, (2) ranked search for top relevant sections, (3) raw file load for highest-scoring documents. Combines search intelligence with raw access. Requires Team plan or higher.

query.description: The question or topic to explore

maxTokens.description: Token budget for raw file content (default: 16000)

topK.description: Number of top sections to use for file selection (default: 5)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_replContext
languageModelTools.userDescription: Package context for REPL with Python helpers (Pro+)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Package project context for REPL consumption. Returns a structured dict of files and sections plus Python helper code (peek, grep, sections, files) ready for injection into an rlm-runtime REPL session. Requires Pro plan or higher.

query.description: Optional query to filter context by relevance. If empty, loads files in order within budget.

includeHelpers.description: Include Python helper code (peek, grep, sections, files) in setup_code (default: true)

searchMode.description: Search mode when query is provided (default: hybrid)

languageModelTools.name: snipara_getChunk
languageModelTools.userDescription: Load full cited source content by chunk ID
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve full content by chunk ID. Use with rlm_context_query results that include references when the agent needs exact cited source text.

chunk_id.description: Chunk ID from a Snipara retrieval result

languageModelTools.name: snipara_codeNeighbors
languageModelTools.userDescription: Return local code graph context around a symbol
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return the local code subgraph around a repo-qualified symbol. Prefer this for structural code questions when a code index is available.

symbol_key.description: Stable symbol key for exact matching

languageModelTools.name: snipara_codeCallers
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find callers of a code symbol
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find callers of a code symbol using the persisted code graph.

symbol_key.description: Stable symbol key for exact matching

languageModelTools.name: snipara_codeImports
languageModelTools.userDescription: List imports or importers for a symbol or file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List imports for a code symbol or file, or find importers of a module.

symbol_key.description: Stable symbol key for exact matching

direction.description: out for imports, in for importers

languageModelTools.name: snipara_codeShortestPath
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find the shortest structural path between two code symbols
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find the shortest structural path between two code symbols using the persisted code graph.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_rememberIfNovel
languageModelTools.userDescription: Store durable memory only if it is novel
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Store a durable Memory V2 record only if it is sufficiently novel compared with existing memories. Use for reusable facts, decisions, learnings, preferences, todos, and context.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_endOfTaskCommit
languageModelTools.userDescription: Persist durable outcomes from a task summary
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Persist durable task outcomes into memory. Use at the end of a meaningful task to extract decisions, learnings, preferences, todos, and workflow context while filtering operational receipts.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_memoryHealth
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect project memory hygiene
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read-only memory hygiene diagnostics. Returns memory counts, category distribution, compaction threshold status, and anomaly samples.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_memoryReviewQueue
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect candidate or stale memories awaiting review
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Private review surface for candidate, stale, rejected, invalidated, superseded, archived, active, or approved memories.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_decisionCreate
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a structured project decision
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create an ADR-style structured decision record with context, rationale, alternatives, and optional revert plan.

revert_plan.description: How to revert this decision if needed

languageModelTools.name: snipara_decisionQuery
languageModelTools.userDescription: Query structured project decisions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query project decisions by text, status, impact, scope, tags, or recency.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_indexHealth
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect project index health
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get comprehensive index health metrics including coverage, quality scores, tier distribution, stale document detection, and overall health score.

stale_threshold_days.description: Days after which content is considered stale, default 30

languageModelTools.name: snipara_indexRecommendations
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get index improvement recommendations
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get prioritized recommendations to improve project index health.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_reindex
languageModelTools.userDescription: Trigger or poll a project reindex job
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trigger a document or code reindex job, or poll an existing reindex job by job ID.

job_id.description: Existing reindex job ID to poll

languageModelTools.name: snipara_searchAnalytics
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect search performance analytics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get query counts, success rates, latency percentiles, tool usage breakdown, daily trends, and error analysis.

days.description: Number of days to analyze, default 30

languageModelTools.name: snipara_queryTrends
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect query trends over time
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get time-bucketed query counts, success rates, and latency for trend analysis.

days.description: Number of days to analyze, default 7

languageModelTools.name: snipara_htaskTree
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect a hierarchical task tree
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a full hierarchical task tree from a swarm root or task node.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_htaskRecommendations
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get recommended ready hierarchical tasks
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get prioritized N3 hierarchical tasks ready to work on. Useful for agent workflow coordination.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_htaskMetrics
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get hierarchical task metrics for a swarm
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get htask throughput, aging by level, blocked/recovered ratio, and top blockers for a swarm.

languageModelTools.name: snipara_executePython
languageModelTools.userDescription: Execute Python code via RLM Runtime
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute Python code safely using RLM Runtime with optional Docker isolation. Use when the user asks to run code, test implementations, or validate code behavior. Defaults to Docker-isolated execution for safety.

code.description: The Python code or task description to execute
